model.label: Claude Opus 4.6
model.description: Anthropic • Hybrid reasoning model that pushes the frontier for coding and AI agents, featuring a 1M context window.

pick.rationale: Florida is the #4 ranked team nationally in both KenPom and Torvik with a 26-7 SEC record, boasting an elite offense (AdjO 125.6, 9th nationally) and one of the best defenses in the country (AdjD 91.8, top 5), producing an adjusted efficiency margin of +33.83 points per 100 possessions. Lehigh, a 16-seed Patriot League play-in winner ranked 284th in KenPom with a negative efficiency margin (-10.38), an 18-16 record, and both an offense (290th) and defense (262nd) ranked near the bottom of Division I, is outclassed in every measurable dimension. The roughly 44-point efficiency gap per 100 possessions is staggering, and with 1-seeds historically defeating 16-seeds at a rate exceeding 99%, Florida should win this game comfortably.

reasoningStep.title: Florida vs Lehigh – 1/16 Seed Matchup Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Florida's elite profile as the #4 team nationally with a +33.83 efficiency margin dwarfs Lehigh's -10.38 margin, creating a 44-point gap per 100 possessions that makes this one of the most lopsided matchups in the entire tournament.
evidence: Florida ranks 4th in both KenPom and Torvik with AdjO 125.6 (9th) and AdjD 91.8 (top 5) in the SEC
Lehigh ranks 284th in KenPom with AdjO 102.8 (290th) and AdjD 113.1 (262nd) from the Patriot League with an 18-16 record
The ~44-point adjusted efficiency margin gap per 100 possessions is among the largest in the tournament
Historical 1-vs-16 upset rate is less than 1%, and no credible upset path exists given the magnitude of the quality gap

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

The search tools are temporarily unavailable, but the ratings data provides more than enough information to make this call. This is a classic 1 vs 16 matchup with an enormous quality gap.

**Key facts:**
- **Florida**: KenPom #4, Torvik #4, AdjEM +33.83, AdjO 125.6 (9th), AdjD 91.8 (elite, top 5), 26-7 record in the SEC
- **Lehigh**: KenPom #284, Torvik #282, AdjEM -10.38, AdjO 102.8 (290th), AdjD 113.1 (262nd), 18-16 record in the Patriot League

The efficiency margin gap is **+44.21 points per 100 possessions** — one of the largest possible gaps in the tournament. Lehigh ranks near the bottom in both offense and defense nationally. Florida is an elite team on both ends of the floor.
